raw.subject: Your Dayton page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I love the humor and personality you bring to your Facebook page - "Just a reminder: I do it all " has me smiling every time. It's clear you have a passion for taking care of pets and their owners in the Dayton area.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving some of those potential clients who prefer to research online before booking a sitter.

I sketched out a simple homepage idea that incorporates some of the great photos and information you already share on Facebook. It includes a services overview with your in-home pet care options, a photo gallery of some of the happy pets you've cared for, and a contact section with your phone number and email address.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/homebound-pet-sitting-dayton

If you're interested in learning more about building a simple website for your business, I'd love to chat more about it and provide a straightforward quote for local businesses.

Reply or give me a quick call to discuss further.
